teamObjective.explanation: Partner (player 2) is down to 2 cards and close to finishing. With a hand of only low non-trump diamonds, I cannot dominate the table. The best team objective is to lead the smallest card so partner has the highest chance to take the lead with one of their remaining cards and push toward finishing.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner likely holds at least one card above 3 of diamonds, possibly a trump or high card, since they are near finish with only 2 cards. They may be trying to win a cheap trick to go out.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponents have 3 cards each and no public plays are known. They probably contain some cards higher than 3 of diamonds, possibly including trumps. They will likely try to win the trick to prevent partner from finishing.

actionRationale.primaryReason: Leading the 3 of diamonds is the smallest possible non-trump single. It minimizes the value of the card I commit, maximizes the chance partner can overtake it with one of their two remaining cards, and forces opponents to reveal strength if they choose to win.

whyNotAlternatives.reason: Playing the 4 instead of the 3 uses a higher card without increasing the chance partner can win the trick; it is strictly worse when partner is near finish and may need a low lead.
The 5 is higher than necessary and consumes a card that could be more useful later; it does not improve the lead and reduces partner's ability to overtake cheaply.
The 6 is my highest non-trump card. Leading it wastes the only card that has the best chance of winning a later non-trump single, and still likely loses to opponents or partner.

risks: Opponents may have a higher non-trump card or trump and win the lead, putting partner under pressure.
If partner cannot beat the 3, the lead transfers to an opponent, who could then attack partner's finishing hand.
I have no trumps or high cards, so I cannot reclaim the lead easily.
riskAssessment.mitigation: By leading the absolute lowest card, I reduce the chance opponents need to use a trump to win and increase the chance partner can take control with a modest card, aligning with the partner_near_finish scenario.

notes: All legal candidates are non-trump singles; the only differentiator is rank. The partner_near_finish tag makes the lowest lead the clear choice.
